div.head: 87. Telegram From the Central Intelligence Agency to PBSUCCESS Headquarters in FloridaSource: Central Intelligence Agency, Job 79-01025A, Box 7, Folder 2. Secret; Routine; RYBAT; PBSUCCESS.
div.p: 35910. Ref: DIR 21969.Not printed. (Ibid., Folder 1) For purposes PBSUCCESS program and to help support ODYOKE position forthcoming OAS Conference Caracas, urge all stations your jurisdiction give top priority obtention solid evidence of Guatemalan support of subversion or interventionist activities neighboring countries as requested ref.
